There was an owl owl o'clock.

She lay on her branch an owl owl thought.

Why do owls alone just?

Because owls know owl talk.

Ow Ow Ow.

I thought owls love Owls.

That's owl.

A owl owl owl owl owl owl mouse.

I owl owl Ow Ow Ow Ow.

Like Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow Ow.
